description_long: This object consists of a group of beverage containers, including four large orange juice bottles with green caps, several green cans, two purple glass bottles, and four large dark bottles with red labels and caps. The orange juice bottles are translucent, showing a yellow-orange liquid inside, and have a white label with indistinct graphics. The green cans are metallic and feature a light-colored label, while the purple bottles are slender and opaque with a white label. The dark bottles are plastic, with a red patterned label and matching red cap, resembling soda bottles. All containers are arranged in neat rows, suggesting a display or storage scenario. The materials appear to be a mix of plastic, glass, and metal, with the contents visible in some containers.
description: A group of assorted beverage containers, including orange juice bottles, green cans, purple bottles, and large dark bottles with red labels, arranged in rows.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four orange juice bottles in the foreground, with green cans, purple bottles, and large dark bottles with red labels behind them.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the containers in a straight line: orange juice bottles on the left, green cans and purple bottles in the center, and dark bottles with red labels on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the dark bottles with red labels in the foreground, orange juice bottles at the back, and green cans and purple bottles partially visible in the middle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark bottles on the left, orange juice bottles on the right, and green cans and purple bottles in the center.
